description:
The InteractiveCamera component is used in the resonite default camera and is a way of easily taking pictures.

See Camera for more up to date info.

fields.CameraMode: The mode the camera is in for taking pictures.
fields.PreviewWidth: The width in pixels of the preview image on the camera screen.
fields.PreviewHeight: The height in pixels of the preview image on the camera screen.
fields.RenderWidth: The output width in pixels of the final picture.
fields.StereoSeparation: How far apart the left and right eyes should be when taking a stereo picture.
fields.TimerInterval: How long the timer should be for taking a photo.
fields.TimerEnabled: Whether the timer mode for taking pictures is enabled.
fields.LastCaptureTime: The last time in world seconds that this camera took a picture.
fields.TimerCountIndicator: The string field to drive with the amount of seconds remaining in the current picture countdown indicator.
fields.TimerColorIndicator: The color field to drive with the indicator color of the current photo countdown timer.
fields._timerStartPoint: The world time in seconds when the user started the photo take timer.
fields._timerUser: The user that is handling taking the photo and doing the timer countdown.
fields.MainCamera: The main camera being used to preview photos to the screen and render them.
fields.SecondaryCamera: The secondary alt camera being used to take photos and render them to the screen.
fields.PreviewTexture: The texture that is being rendered to for the camera screen preview on the back of the camera.
fields.DisplayMaterial: The material being used to display the camera preview.
fields.Format: In what image type to take pictures in.
fields.Quality: The quality encoding for taken pictures.
fields.SpawnPhotoInWorld: Whether to spawn taken photos into the world.
fields.PhotoSpawnPoint: Where to spawn photos and parent them when they are printed out.
fields.PhotoSpawnSize: How big to spawn the photos.
fields.PanoramaIndicator: the slot that holds the panorama indicator visual.
fields.PanoramaIndicatorSize: The field to drive so the camera can change the Panorama indicator visual size.
fields.ObjectTargetSource: The slot to shoot a raycast from for selective rendering a camera when doing the selective object mode.
fields.ObjectTargetSourceActive: The active field of the object target source Laser visual
fields.ObjectAutoPose: Whether to automatically adjust the camera to look at the targeted object.
fields.HideLasersOnCapture: Whether to hide user lasers when taking photos.
fields.CaptureSound: The audio clip to play when taking photos.
fields.TimerStartSound: The audio to play when a photo countdown timer starts.
fields.TimerCountdownSlowPlayer: The audio to play when the photo countdown timer is just starting and is counting down.
fields.TimerCountdownFastPlayer: The audio to play as the timer for the photo countdown timer is reaching completion.
fields.TimerCountdownSlowOutput: The audio output component that plays the ``TimerCountdownSlowPlayer``.
fields.TimerCountdownFastOutput: The audio output component that plays the ``TimerCountdownFastPlayer``.
fields.PreviewScale: How big the preview display above the camera should be.
fields.CameraModelOverride: Overrides the text for what kind of camera took a photo generated by this component in the metadata.
fields.FrustumVisual: The mesh that is used to show the camera fustrum
fields.DefaultNearClip: The default nearclip to be used with the camera.
fields.DefaultFarClip: The default farclip to be used with the camera.
fields._frustumPosition: The field to drive with position of the fustrum visual.
fields._frustumRotation: The field to drive with the rotation of the fustrum visual.
fields._frustumVerticalFOV: The field to drive with the vertical field view angle of the fustrum mesh.
fields._frustumHorizontalFOV: The field to drive with the horizontal field view angle of the fustrum mesh.
fields._frustumNear: The field to drive with the nearclip of the fustrum mesh.
fields._frustumFar: The field to drive with the farclip of the fustrum mesh.
fields._leftCamOffset: The field to drive with the offset of the left camera for stero images.
fields._rightCamOffset: The field to drive with the offset of the right camera for stero images.
fields._leftCamOrientation: The field to drive with the rotation of the left camera for stero images.
fields._rightCamOrientation: The field to drive with the rotation of the right camera for stero images.
fields._cameraRendering: The field to drive with whether the main camera should be enabled and rendering.
fields._secondaryCameraRendering: The field to drive with whether the secondary camera should be enabled and rendering.
fields.ExclusiveOperators: The users that should be excluded from taken photos due to their privacy settings.
fields.ControlActiveFields: A list of booleans to drive to whether this camera is being auto moved by control rather than manual positioning.
fields.RenderOnlyForUsers: The users that should only appear in the photo and exlude everyone else.
fields.ForceVisualsOff: Whether to force this camera's visuals to off.
fields.VisualActiveFields: A list of boolean fields to drive for the visuals of this camera.
fields.AutoHideProximity: How close the camera can be before it hides itself for the local user.
fields.ForceEyeAttentionUsers: The list of users to force their eyes to look at the camera.
fields.SimulatingUser: The user that is handling the processing for this camera.
fields.DestroyOnUserLeave: The user that when leaving will trigger the destruction of this camera.
fields.PositioningMode: How the camera should position itself.
fields.ActiveAnchor: The current camera anchor this camera is on.
fields.AnchorInterpolationSpeed: How fast to move between anchors.
fields.AnchorLinearInterpolation: Whether the camera should move between anchors in a linear speed fashion.
fields.FrameTargetUser: The user to frame in the shot.
fields.HeadPointOffset: How much to add an offset to a user's head when targeting it.
fields.AnglePosition: tilt of the camera side to side
fields.Distance: How far away to stay from a subject during auto tracking.
fields.HeightOffset: How much offset to add to targeting a user's head vertically.
fields.FirstPersonPitch: The current first person rotation transform pitch.
fields.FirstPersonRoll: The current first person rotation transform roll.
fields.FirstPersonOffset: The offset forward or backwards in first person currently.
fields.GroupIncludeRadius: How close a user needs to be to others to be in a group.
fields.GroupExcludeRadius: How far a user needs to move from a group before they are removed as being part of a group.
fields.ForceGroupInclude: A list of users to force include into the target group.
fields.ForceGroupExclude: A list of users to force exclude from the target group.
fields.PositionSmoothSpeed: The smooth speed of the camera's position during auto tracking.
fields.AnglePositionSmoothSpeed: The smooth speed of the camera's angle position during auto tracking.
fields.FramingSmoothSpeed: The smooth speed of the camera's position during auto tracking for framing.
fields.WobbleMagnitude: How much the camera's position should randomly wobble.
fields.WobbleSeed: The seed of the randomization algorithm of the camera's wobble.
fields.WobbleSpeed: How fast the camera should randomly wobble.
fields.FramingViewportPosition: Where to frame the target object in the viewport of the camera rather than the center of the image.
fields.AvoidOcclusion: Whether to take target player(s) colliders into account when framing users. Can help with clipping off arms or legs.
fields.OcclusionIncludePlayers: Whether occlusion should try to keep players in view.
fields.OcclusionIncludeAnyColliders: Whether the occlusion should include any collider. If false, ignores character colliders.
fields._positionStream: The stream of the position data for this camera when auto tracking.
fields._rotationStream: The stream of the rotation data for this camera when auto tracking.
fields._positionDrive: The field to drive for the position of the camera when auto tracking.
fields._rotationDrive: The field to drive for the rotation of the camera when auto tracking.
fields._releasePosition: The position at the time ``_positionDrive`` became null.
fields._releaseRotation: The rotation at the time ``_rotationDrive`` became null.

methods.Trigger: Tells camera to take photo as if the user pressed the picture button themselves.
methods.Capture: Tells the camera to instantly take a photo.
